return(function(S,i,G,q,x,Q,f,O,c,U,T,o,d,W,P,v,I,J,N,m,Z,M,V,D)T,v,P,J,D,Z,V,W,M,o,I,U,O,m,d,c,N={},function(S,a)local i=M(a)local G=function(G)return D(S,{G},a,i)end return G end,{},function(S,a)local i=M(a)local G=function(G,q,x,Q,f,T)return D(S,{G;q;x,Q,f,T},a,i)end return G end,function(D,G,q,x)local VP={}local q_,Z_,a_,A_,b,O_,m_,h,R,QP,v_,k_,U_,L,t_,i_,H_,M_,F_,w_,J_,f,f_,PP,M,X,C,z_,u_,N_,T_,l_,R_,p,fP,r_,e_,C_,d,Y,x_,y_,d_,b_,e,X_,GP,A,DP,l,xP,V_,I_,n_,P,W_,L_,qP,mP,B_,y,r,j,H,aP,z,SP,g_,E,P_,s_,G_,E_,n,h_,I,B,dP,s,w,TP,IP,K_,p_,g,iP,c_,o_,t,u,S_,K,Y_,c,Q_,D_,j_,k,F,MP
